title: Nullified: Reborn
description: This modpack will specifically be used for NullifiedSMP. Every update the modpack will change and add new mods or remove mods off from the modpack! To join the SMP you'll require the latest version of the modpack.
body:
#  Welcome to Nullified: Reborn
This modpack will specifically be used for NullifiedSMP. Every update the modpack will change and add new mods or remove mods off from the modpack!

# Expectations of Nullified: Reborn Modpack
This modpack will contain a variety of mods, especially during new seasons. Every new Season the mods will change; new mods, removal of mods, mods that were seen in previous Seasons and other versions of Minecraft will sometimes occurr on a new Nullified season.

Looking for a Minecraft server that has an active Owner and an opening community? Feel free to join NullifiedSMP in which this modpack runs on the server. We are always looking for new members to join and to have fun with each other.

# **INSTALL THE LATEST VERSION TO JOIN THE SERVER**
## Server IP: play.nullifiedsmp.net
